bio: I'm a full-stack developer at <sudalys>Sudalys</sudalys>, where I create and maintain web and mobile applications and manage the CI/CD pipelines for web apps.
I'm passionate about clean architecture, learning, developer experience, and turning complex problems into elegant solutions.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Where I've worked and what I've built.

description: GIS Infrastructure Development: Developed a Geographic Information System (GIS) based on the GR@CE THD standard, optimizing the management and deployment of fiber optic networks.
Cross-Platform Network Management: Designed and implemented a responsive web and mobile application to streamline real-time network monitoring and administration.
Authentication & Security: Architected and deployed a centralized SSO (Single Sign-On) system, ensuring seamless and secure access across the entire company software ecosystem.

items.description: Built internal tooling and REST APIs. Migrated legacy jQuery codebase to React, improving performance by 40%.
Developed features across the full stack. Participated in code reviews and agile ceremonies.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've built.

items.title: Project Alpha
items.description: A real-time collaborative dashboard built with WebSockets and React.

items.title: Project Beta
items.description: E-commerce platform with Stripe integration and inventory management.
